User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user information and their role within the Kriptum Arsenal.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture

isPro.description: Whether the user has paid for full access

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user first logged in

Notification.title: Arsenal Notification
Notification.description: Real-time updates sent from the command center to all agents.

authorName.description: Name of the agent who sent the update

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profile documents indexed by their Firebase Auth UID.

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Global feed of updates visible to all authenticated agents.
